terms.definition: The username of the Zoho Creator account owner (workspace owner) under which the application is hosted.
terms.context: Path parameter required in nearly every API endpoint.

terms.definition: The unique URL-friendly identifier (link name) for a Zoho Creator application within an account.
terms.context: Path parameter used alongside account_owner_name to scope requests to a specific application.

terms.definition: The URL-friendly identifier for a specific form within a Zoho Creator application.
terms.context: Used in Data API and Bulk Insert API paths to target a particular form.

terms.definition: The URL-friendly identifier for a specific report (view) within a Zoho Creator application.
terms.context: Used in Data API, Publish API, and Bulk Read API paths.

terms.definition: Unique numeric string identifier assigned to each record in a Zoho Creator form or report.
terms.context: Used to target individual records for GET, PATCH, and DELETE operations.

terms.definition: The URL-friendly identifier for a specific field within a form, used in file upload/download endpoints.
terms.context: Required parameter for File API endpoints.

terms.definition: Unique identifier for a Bulk Read or Bulk Insert asynchronous job.
terms.context: Returned when creating a bulk job; used to poll status and retrieve results.

terms.definition: API category providing CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) on application records.
API category for accessing publicly accessible report views and form submissions without requiring full OAuth.
API category for uploading and downloading file/image field attachments in records.
terms.context: Covers upload and download endpoints under /creator/v2/data/**.

terms.definition: API category for retrieving metadata about applications, forms, reports, fields, pages, and sections.
API category enabling asynchronous export of large datasets from reports as downloadable files.
API category enabling asynchronous batch insertion of records into a form.
Authentication protocol used by Zoho Creator API; requires client credentials and scopes prefixed with ZohoCreator.
terms.context: All non-publish endpoints require a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

terms.definition: OAuth permission string controlling access level, e.g. ZohoCreator.data.application.READ or ZohoCreator.meta.form.READ.
terms.context: Scopes are granular per resource type and access level (READ, WRITE, DELETE, ALL).

terms.definition: A URL-safe, snake_case display identifier Zoho Creator assigns to forms, reports, and fields.
terms.context: Used throughout path parameters; can be found in application metadata responses.

terms.definition: A filter expression string applied to report queries to narrow returned records, e.g. (Department=="Engineering").
terms.context: Query parameter for Data API list endpoints.
